title: Teja2 Real Estate | Sell Your House in Aljarafe
description: Guide to selling a house in Aljarafe with professional pricing, marketing and legal safety.
hero: If you plan to sell in Aljarafe, you need a strategy adapted to Tomares, Mairena, Bormujos and Castilleja.

sections.heading: How we manage sales
items: Qualified visits and formal offer management.

sections.heading: Professional exclusive mandate
items: Real advertising investment and structured workflow.
Professional fee: 3% + VAT of final sale price.

faqs.question: How long does it take to sell in Aljarafe?
faqs.answer: Timing depends on price, condition and location. Correctly priced homes can sell in a few weeks.

faqs.question: Is exclusivity mandatory?
faqs.answer: Not mandatory, but usually more effective for professional execution.

faqs.question: Which documents are needed?
faqs.answer: Registry note, local tax receipts and energy certificate are recommended.
